name: High trust count avatar (group with 1500+ members)
description: Tests graph loading and pathfinding performance with a group that has 1,552+ incoming trust edges (members). Verifies the pathfinder handles large edge count without timeout or memory issues. Source is the largest group on the network.
notes: Avatar 0xdc287474... has 5,620 outgoing trusts, making it one of the most connected nodes. This tests OR-Tools scaling with dense graphs.
